title: Ministry of Finance Corrects Hindi Text of GST Settlement of Funds Rules, 2026
content:
# Ministry of Finance Corrects Hindi Text of GST Settlement of Funds Rules, 2026

Ek important update hai for all Chartered Accountants and tax professionals! The Ministry of Finance, Department of Revenue, ne Goods and Services Tax Settlement of Funds Rules, 2026 se related ek important corrigendum (shuddhipatra) announce kiya hai.

This correction specifically addresses an issue in the Hindi version of the original notification.

*   **Original Notification:** Notification No. G.S.R. 225(E) dated March 30, 2026, which pertains to the Goods and Services Tax Settlement of Funds Rules, 2026.
*   **Correction Issued Via:** Notification No. G.S.R. 350(E)
*   **Date of Corrigendum Publication:** May 11, 2026
*   **Specific Correction:** The corrigendum addresses an inaccuracy in Rule 1(1) on page 1 of the Hindi version of the Notification No. G.S.R. 225(E). This ensures clarity and accuracy in the official Hindi text of the rules.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Visit the CBIC Website for Notifications](https://www.cbic.gov.in/)

*Published on: 12 May 2026*
